sections.title: Executive Summary
sections.rendered_content:
The following comparison of AMG, GLE, AMC, GME is using each company's most recent annual filing, covering revenue scale, profitability, leverage, and cash generation.

AMG generated $2.07B in revenue (1.6% YoY) and $717M in net income (2025-12-31). Key profile markers include net margin of 34.5%, debt-to-equity of 0.64x, free cash flow of $967M.

GLE generated $2.9M in revenue (-53.6% YoY) and -$744K in net income (2025-06-30). Key profile markers include net margin of -25.3%, free cash flow of -$1.3M.

AMC generated $4.85B in revenue (4.6% YoY) and -$632M in net income (2025-12-31). Key profile markers include net margin of -13.0%, debt-to-equity of -2.12x, free cash flow of -$366M.

GME generated $3.82B in revenue (-27.5% YoY) and $131M in net income (2025-02-01). Key profile markers include net margin of 3.4%, debt-to-equity of 0.01x, free cash flow of $130M.

AMC leads the peer set on absolute revenue, while AMG carries the highest net margin — a classic scale-versus-efficiency divergence.

AMC generated $4.85B in revenue (4.6% YoY) and -$632M in net income (2025-12-31). Key profile markers include net margin of -13.0%, debt-to-equity of -2.12x, free cash flow of -$366M.
GME generated $3.82B in revenue (-27.5% YoY) and $131M in net income (2025-02-01). Key profile markers include net margin of 3.4%, debt-to-equity of 0.01x, free cash flow of $130M.

sections.title: Relative Strengths
sections.rendered_content:
ROE of 16.9% exceeds the 15% institutional threshold, reflecting productive deployment of book equity.

No clear quantitative outperformance signal is active for GLE in the current period lock.

No clear quantitative outperformance signal is active for AMC in the current period lock.

Current ratio of 8.05x provides a wide liquidity cushion relative to near-term obligations.

sections.title: Risk Comparison
sections.rendered_content:
Risk signals below are drawn from each peer's locked annual data; metrics not reported by a peer are excluded rather than imputed.

AMG: Pretax income (1.2B) does not reconcile with net_income + income_tax_expense (998.9M).

GLE: Net margin is -25.3%, indicating a loss-making profile. Revenue declined 53.6% versus prior year.

AMC: Net margin is -13.0%, indicating a loss-making profile. Operating cash flow is negative in the current annual period.

GME: Revenue declined 27.5% versus prior year.
